# Wadi Al Awir Car Accessories

> Premium car accessories and services for Jetour T2 and ROX 01 vehicles in Al Awir, Dubai, UAE.

## Business Info

- Name: Wadi Al Awir Car Accessories / وادي العوير لزينة السيارات
- Location: Al Awir 1, Dubai, UAE
- Phone: +971 55 357 3156
- Hours: 9 AM – 11 PM daily
- Rating: 4.4 stars (33 Google reviews)
- Payment: Cash, credit cards, Tabby installments (split in 4)
- Instagram: @wadi_alawir

## Products

We sell accessories for:
- **Jetour T2 (2023-2024)**: Mud guards, brake caliper covers, ambient lighting, door handle protectors, mud flaps, tow bar, fog lights, spare tire covers, crystal gear lever, phone holder, screen protector, under-seat covers, wheel spacers, side storage boxes, rear spoilers, side ladders, car mats, dashcam, key covers, and alloy rims.
- **Jetour ROX 01 (2024-2025)**: Mud guards, brake caliper covers, ambient lighting, door handle protectors, fog lights, crystal gear lever, phone holder, screen protector, roof lights, defender lights, and alloy rims.

All products include professional installation. Prices range from 75 to 1500 AED.

## Services

- **Window Tinting**: Three tiers (Standard, Premium, Ultra Premium) for Jetour T2. Prices from 650-1200 AED.
- **Paint Protection Film (PPF)**: Full body protection against scratches and rock chips.
- **Ceramic Coating**: Long-lasting paint protection with hydrophobic properties.
- **Car Detailing**: Interior and exterior deep cleaning and restoration.
- **Custom Accessories**: Bespoke modifications and installations.

- Homepage: https://wadialawir.com/
- All Products: https://wadialawir.com/products.html
- Individual Products: https://wadialawir.com/product.html?id={product-id}
